languages.text: "Ну и долго нам еще ждать? Эдак от старости быстрее помрешь, чем от болезни!"
"How long do we have to wait? I'll die of old age before the disease at this rate!"
languages.original_text: "Ну и долго нам еще ждать? Эдак от старости быстрее помрешь, чем от болезни!"

traits.locale_text: "How long do we have to wait? I'll die of old age before the disease at this rate!"
"How long do we have to wait? I'll die of old age before the disease at this rate!"
"How long do we have to wait? I'll die of old age before the disease at this rate!"

languages.text: 「どれくらい待たなきゃいけないの？この調子じゃ、病気で死ぬ前に老死する！」
languages.original_text: "How long do we have to wait? I'll die of old age before the disease at this rate!"

languages.text: "Daha ne kadar bekleyeceğiz? Bu gidişle hastalıktan önce yaşlılıktan öleceğim!"
languages.original_text: "How long do we have to wait? I'll die of old age before the disease at this rate!"

traits.locale_text: "Daha ne kadar bekleyeceğiz? Bu gidişle hastalıktan önce yaşlılıktan öleceğim!"

languages.text: “还要等多久？照这速度，没等病死，我都老死了！”
languages.original_text: "How long do we have to wait? I'll die of old age before the disease at this rate!"

traits.locale_text: “还要等多久？照这速度，没等病死，我都老死了！”

languages.text: "Wie lange müssen wir warten? Wenn das so weitergeht, sterbe ich an Altersschwäche!"
languages.original_text: "How long do we have to wait? I'll die of old age before the disease at this rate!"

traits.locale_text: "Wie lange müssen wir warten? Wenn das so weitergeht, sterbe ich an Altersschwäche!"

languages.text: « Nous allons devoir attendre encore longtemps ? À ce rythme, je vais finir par mourir de vieillesse avant que cette fichue maladie ne me tue ! »
languages.original_text: "How long do we have to wait? I'll die of old age before the disease at this rate!"

traits.locale_text: « Nous allons devoir attendre encore longtemps ? À ce rythme, je vais finir par mourir de vieillesse avant que cette fichue maladie ne me tue ! »

languages.text: «¿Cuánto tiempo tenemos que esperar? ¡A este ritmo, la edad me matará antes que la enfermedad!».
languages.original_text: "How long do we have to wait? I'll die of old age before the disease at this rate!"

traits.locale_text: «¿Cuánto tiempo tenemos que esperar? ¡A este ritmo, la edad me matará antes que la enfermedad!».
